description: Tiny golden retrieval KB for the rag-service eval harness. Each document is one chunk (id == doc_id). Queries carry the set of relevant chunk ids. Mixed lexical + paraphrase queries so hybrid (lexical) and rerank can beat dense-only with the deterministic mock embedder.

documents.content: The refund policy allows a full refund within 30 days for enterprise plans.
Standard plans have a 14-day return window for refunds instead of 30 days.
To request a refund, open a support ticket and include your order number.
Shipping is free for orders over fifty dollars shipped within the country.
International shipping fees are calculated at checkout based on destination.
Password reset links expire after one hour for account security.
Two-factor authentication can be enabled from the account security settings page.
The API rate limit is 100 requests per minute per API key on the free tier.
Enterprise API keys raise the rate limit to 10000 requests per minute.
Webhooks retry with exponential backoff for up to 24 hours on delivery failure.
Invoices are generated monthly and emailed to the billing contact on file.
You can update the billing contact email under the organization settings.
Data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3.
Audit logs are retained for 90 days on the free plan and 365 days on enterprise.
Single sign-on via SAML is available exclusively on enterprise plans.
The mobile app supports offline reading and syncs when connectivity returns.
Exported reports are available in CSV and PDF formats from the dashboard.
Scheduled reports can be emailed daily, weekly, or monthly to a distribution list.
Custom roles let admins grant granular permissions to team members.
Deleting a workspace permanently removes all of its documents after a 7-day grace period.

queries.query: how do I get my money back for an order
data encryption at rest and in transit
how long are audit logs kept

multihop.description: MultiHop-RAG-style slice (B2 / decompose): each query's answer needs facts that live in SEPARATE documents, so a single query vector cannot co-retrieve them. mock_decompose splits each compound query on 'and' into focused sub-questions; the union of per-sub-question retrievals co-retrieves the scattered supporting chunks. NOTE (measurement gap): the mock embedder is non-semantic, so this slice demonstrates that decomposition CO-RETRIEVES the scattered facts (recall@10 == 1.0) and never regresses vs single-query; a strict retrieval LIFT over single-query needs a real embedder (the mock's lexical leg finds a chunk whenever its distinctive tokens appear in the query, and sub-question tokens are a substring of the compound query).

documents.content: The free tier API rate limit is one hundred requests per minute per key.
Customer data residency can be pinned to the Frankfurt region for compliance.
Password reset links expire after exactly one hour for account security.
Two factor authentication requires a time based authenticator app code.
The pro tier API rate limit is one thousand requests per minute per key.
Enterprise API rate limit raises requests per minute to ten thousand per key.
Traffic above the API rate limit returns HTTP 429 within the per minute window.
API keys inherit their tier rate limit and requests per minute allowance.
Invoices are emailed monthly to the billing contact on file.
The mobile app supports offline reading and syncs when connectivity returns.
Exported reports are available in CSV and PDF formats from the dashboard.
Custom roles let admins grant granular permissions to team members.

queries.query: What is the free tier API rate limit per minute and which region can customer data residency be pinned to?
How long do password reset links stay valid and what does two factor authentication require?

multiquery.description: RAG-Fusion slice (B3 / multi_query): the ORIGINAL query wording shares no vocabulary with the relevant chunks (a vocabulary-mismatch miss), so single-query retrieval leaves them out of the top-k. The hand-authored variants use the chunks' vocabulary; per-variant retrieval + app-level RRF fusion recovers them. The variants are authored (not substrings of the original) precisely so the recall lift is real under the non-semantic mock embedder (its lexical leg matches the variant vocabulary).

documents.content: Reimbursement for cancelled orders is issued to the original payment method.
A restocking deduction applies to opened hardware before reimbursement.
Unsubscribe from marketing notifications in your communication preferences.
Opt out of promotional broadcasts by toggling the newsletter switch.
Shipping is free for orders over fifty dollars within the country.
Two factor authentication is enabled from the account security settings.
Audit logs are retained for ninety days on the free plan.
The mobile app supports offline reading and later syncing.
Webhooks retry with exponential backoff for a day on failure.
Custom roles grant granular permissions to team members.
